title: Room layout — {roomId}.json
description: Defines hotspot layout for a single room. Contains only geometry (id + polygon). All content (label, popup) lives in the hotspot's own hotspot.json.

hotspots.description: Ordered list of hotspot layout entries. Order determines rendering/click priority.

id.description: Unique hotspot identifier. Must start with 'hs_'. Used to locate the hotspot's folder: content/rooms/{roomId}/hotspots/{id}/

polygon.description: Bounding polygon in normalised equirectangular coordinates. Each point is [nx, ny] where nx ∈ [0,1] (left→right) and ny ∈ [0,1] (top→bottom).
